LAW AND MOTION, 302, JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED THAT SHE IS A MEMBER OF THE MCFETRIDGE INN OF COURT. RETIRED JUDGE WARREN IS ALSO A MEMBER. THIS WILL NOT AFFECT HER ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN DEALING WITH THIS MOTION AND SHE DOES BELIEVE THAT A PERSON AWARE OF THE FACTS MIGHT REASONABLY ENTERTAIN A DOUBT THAT SHE WILL BE ABLE TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL. NO QUESTIONS WERE ASKED OR OBJECTIONS RAISED. RULING: DEFENDANT SUSANNA SHAW'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY REFERREE/JUDGE JAMES L WARREN BASED ON DECLARATION OF SUSAN SHAW/ UNDER CCP 170.1 AND 170.6 IS DENIED. THE CCP 170.1 AND 170.6 CHALLENGE TO JUDGE WARREN IS UNTIMELY. IN FACT, THE PARTIES STIPULATED THAT JUDGE WARREN BE APPOINTED THE REFEREE FOR ALL PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. Notice Of Motion & Motion To Disqualify Referree/Judge James L Warren Based On Declaration Of Susan Shaw/ Under Ccp 170.1 And 170.6
Off Calendar Jun-20-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL S. WEISS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3824 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. J. HARMOND HUGHEY, TEL. NO. 573-9515 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - Judge Miller disclosed that she is a member of the McFetridge Inn of Court. Retired Judge Warren is also a member. This will not affect her ability to be fair and impartial in dealing with this motion and she does believe that a person aware of the facts might reasonably entertain a doubt that she will be able to be fair and impartial. No questions were asked or objections raised. The matter was argued. After hearing the arguments and reading the Verified Answer of Judge Warren, the court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT SUSANNA SHAW's Motion To Disqualify Referree/Judge James L Warren Based On Declaration Of Susan Shaw/ Under CCP 170.1 And 170.6. is Denied. The CCP 170.1 and 170.6 challenge to Judge Warren is untimely. In fact, the parties stipulated that Judge Warren be appointed the referee for all purposes. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
